locations.name: Andrew Smith (zoologist)
locations.summary: Sir Andrew Smith (3 December 1797 – 11 August 1872) was a British surgeon, explorer, ethnologist and zoologist.

locations.name: 南部非洲
locations.summary: 南部非洲（英语：Southern Africa）即非洲大陆南部地区，不常简称為南非，“南非”（英语：South Africa）通常指南非共和国。联合国地理方案的南部非洲次分区包括下列五個南部非洲关税同盟国家： 博茨瓦纳 史瓦帝尼（斯威士兰…

locations.name: 东非
locations.summary: 东非即非洲的东部地区，根據聯合國的次分區共有18個国家或屬地： 埃塞俄比亞、索馬里（含索馬利蘭）、厄立特里亚和吉布提，以上几國在地理上稱為非洲之角 坦桑尼亚、肯尼亚、乌干达、卢旺达、布隆迪和南苏丹，以上六國組成東非共同體 赞比亚、津巴布韦…

locations.name: 肯尼亚
locations.summary: 肯亞共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Kenya；英語：Republic of Kenya），通稱肯亞（Kenya），是位於東非，濒临印度洋，與索馬里、埃塞俄比亚、南蘇丹、烏干達、坦桑尼亚接壤，面积约58万平方公里。肯亞人口约52…

relations.subject: African barred owlet
relations.evidence: The African barred owlet (Glaucidium capense) is a species of small owl in the family Strigidae found in much of southern, central and eastern Africa

relations.subject: African barred owlet
relations.evidence: capense is endemic to Southern and Eastern Africa from Kenya and the Eastern Cape to Western Angola. The African barred owlet occurs in open habitats with trees such as gallery forest, woodland, forest edge and secondary growth
